recommendations.title: Cindy La Regia
recommendations.overview: When Cindy decides that she doesn't want to marry her boyfriend, she runs to Mexico City, where new friendships and unexpected paths teach her that there are so much more possibilities on her life and her talent than she imagines.

recommendations.title: Sweet Family
recommendations.overview: A fat woman attempts to lose weight in order to use her mother's wedding dress with the help of  her evil sisters and needy fiancé.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1
recommendations.overview: After surviving the Quarter Quell, Katniss finds herself in the hidden stronghold of District 13, where the rebellion against the Capitol is gaining momentum. Struggling with the weight of becoming the symbol of resistance, she must navigate fragile

recommendations.title: Ajab Prem Ki Ghazab Kahani
recommendations.overview: When his love interest doesn't show up for a meeting, a man and his friends go to Goa in order to find her, where they discover she loves someone else.

recommendations.title: Big is Beautiful
recommendations.overview: A resort for individuals who want to lose weight is helps several women discover friendships, acceptance with body image and hard truths.

recommendations.title: Fed Up
recommendations.overview: Fed Up blows the lid off everything we thought we knew about food and weight loss, revealing a 30-year campaign by the food industry, aided by the U.S. government, to mislead and confuse the American public, resulting in one of the largest health epi

recommendations.title: A Sun
recommendations.overview: A family of four fractures under the weight of unmet expectations, unexpected tragedy, and uncompromising pride.

recommendations.title: Requirements to Be a Normal Person
recommendations.overview: Maria is 30 years old, she is a peculiar person and has one goal: become a normal person. But first of all she must discover what is exactly this. Which kind of person is she? Is she a normal person? What does exactly means? That question goes deeper

recommendations.title: Barbecue
recommendations.overview: On his 50th birthday, a man who's been watching his weight, health and temper all his life suffers a heart attack. He's been doing everything he was told he should do and it still didn't help. He decides to turn the page and let loose.

recommendations.title: Police Academy
